intro: Gymnorea hediniana, also known as Gymnorea or African gum tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Celastraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including the treatment of various reproductive issues, such as infertility and impotence, due to its reported anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
